```{python}
# | echo: false
# | output: asis
# Convergence gate, rendered FIRST (METHODS.md: check convergence before reading
# any estimate). Reads diagnostics_summary.json written by diagnostics.py.
d = diag_summary
if not d:
    print(":::{.callout-note}\nNo `diagnostics_summary.json` was found for this fit.\n:::")
else:
    passed = d.get("passed")
    thr = d.get("thresholds", {})
    box = "callout-tip" if passed else "callout-warning"
    head = (
        "Convergence: PASS — diagnostics within thresholds"
        if passed
        else "Convergence: REVIEW — at least one diagnostic is outside threshold"
    )
    mr, me = d.get("max_rhat"), d.get("min_ess")
    bf = d.get("bfmi_per_chain")
    bf_s = ", ".join(f"{x:.2f}" for x in bf) if bf else "n/a"
    lines = [f'::: {{.{box} title="{head}"}}', ""]
    lines.append(f"- **Divergences:** {d.get('divergences')} (target 0)")
    lines.append(
        f"- **Max R-hat:** {mr:.4f} (target ≤ {thr.get('rhat_max')})"
        if mr is not None
        else "- **Max R-hat:** n/a"
    )
    lines.append(
        f"- **Min ESS:** {me:.0f} (target ≥ {thr.get('ess_threshold')})"
        if me is not None
        else "- **Min ESS:** n/a"
    )
    lines.append(f"- **BFMI per chain:** {bf_s} (target ≥ {thr.get('bfmi_threshold')})")
    fails = []
    if d.get("rhat_failing"):
        fails.append("R-hat — " + ", ".join(d["rhat_failing"]))
    if d.get("ess_failing"):
        fails.append("ESS — " + ", ".join(d["ess_failing"]))
    if fails:
        lines += ["", "**Parameters needing attention:** " + "; ".join(fails)]
    if not passed:
        lines += [
            "",
            "Per `METHODS.md`, treat the estimates below as provisional until the gate passes "
            "(in `dev` config the short chains often miss the ESS target — refit in "
            "`reporting` config before interpreting).",
        ]
    lines += ["", ":::"]
    print("\n".join(lines))
```
